creator: empty.japan
caption:
I have received a ton of requests about where to find this place, but the truth is, such magnificent sakura spots are all over Japan and there are hardly any tourists - probably because they aren’t even marked on Google Maps. 

The main trick to finding them is to rent a car and drive through some smaller towns and villages. 

I hope you will be able to uncover some truly hidden sakura gems next year 🌸
